name: dev
label: Developer agent
description: Picks up issues, writes code, opens PRs

webhooks.description: Wake when an issue is labeled

prompts.webhook: An issue was just assigned to you. Implement the changes described in the issue.
prompts.schedule: Poll GitHub for new issues with the trigger label and implement any found.

triggerLabel.description: Issue label that triggers the agent

assignee.description: Assign triggered issues to which user
